name: Extra Rich Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8 x 8-inch pan.
2. Combine sugar, salt, milk, and dark corn syrup in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Stir over medium heat until it boils.
4. Cover and let boil for 2-3 minutes.
5. Uncover and continue to boil over medium heat without stirring until the syrup forms a firm ball when dropped into cold water.
6. Remove from heat and let cool to lukewarm.
7. Mix in peanut butter and vanilla.
8. Stir until thickened.
9. Spread in pan.
10. Let firm, then cut into squares.
